description: Full recording of Joan Hampton presentation at the HSE West Annual Conference, covering community midwifery models in rural Connemara.

description: Evidence review and feasibility arguments for a standalone birth centre serving Galway and the west of Ireland.

description: CPD session on 2024 NRP algorithm updates for community midwives — key changes and scenario practice.

description: Slides and discussion from the Galway MDT postnatal care pathway review session, November 2025.

description: Overview of Joan Hampton NUIG Masters research on day-5 postnatal visit gaps in rural areas of HSE West.

description: Joan Hampton, community midwife in HSE West, explains the case for a standalone midwife-led birth centre in Galway.

description: Tour of Hampton's Rest B&B on the Sky Road in Clifden. Guest rooms, breakfast, and the Atlantic views.

description: Reflecting on the research methods module from the NUIG Masters in Midwifery Practice programme.

description: Highlights from the HSE neonatal resuscitation programme advanced simulation training.
